pages.title: Enphase for Homeowners: Solar, Battery Backup & EV Chargers
pages.description: Explore Enphase home energy solutions for homeowners—microinverters, battery backup, EV charging, and monitoring in the Enphase App for smarter energy use.
pages.content:
[Skip to main content](https://enphase.com/homeowners#main-content)

[Next](https://enphase.com/homeowners#)![Dismiss](https://enphase.com/themes/custom/smalcode/dist/images/dismiss.svg)

- [EV chargers](https://enphase.com/homeowners/iq-ev-charger-2)
- [Portable energy](https://enphase.com/homeowners/portable-energy)

- [Expand California systems](https://enphase.com/homeowners/expansion)
- [Learn](https://enphase.com/homeowners/learn)

# The power of Enphase

#### More reliable. Higher performance. Better safety.

[Get Enphase](https://start.enphase.com/form-enph/?lsid=692)Watch video

[![The power of Enphase](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_size_2800xauto_/public/2024-04/brand%20video%20first%20frame.jpg?itok=FhV6HCYI)](https://start.enphase.com/form-enph/?lsid=692)

It’s solar.

It’s a system.

## And it revolves around you.

Introducing the Enphase Energy System.

In a single hour, the sun generates enough energy to power the lives of every human on earth for an entire year. Imagine if all that power was in your hands.

The Enphase Energy System combines solar, batteries, and EV charging so you can make, use, save, and sell your own energy—and easily manage it all through a smart mobile app.

With an Enphase system, not only can you lower your utility bills and reduce your carbon footprint, but you can also keep your power flowing even when the weather takes an unexpected turn or the grid has a bad day.

Complete home energy, powered by the sun




![Video Thumbnail](https://embed-ssl.wistia.com/deliveries/8c15fe359a699efa23f1529a898c1aa564c3b3e2.webp?image_crop_resized=1920x1562)

Click for sound

![Video Thumbnail](https://embed-ssl.wistia.com/deliveries/dc9f5b6e646c8ce3712cea80c23326e8a2fa3063.webp?image_crop_resized=750x1380)

Click for sound

![Clay house image](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_325x325/public/2025-06/10C_Phase2_Homeowners_Output_Sized_V02.png?itok=4uipVpM9)

![Clay house image](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_325x325/public/2025-06/10C_Phase2_Homeowners_Clayhouse_Color_Mobile_V02.png?itok=LJNwVgCR)

![IQ Battery 10C clayhouse image](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_325x325/public/2025-05/10C_Phase2_Clayhouse_Homeowners.png?itok=2PUFjPGu)

![10c clayhouse mobile image](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_325x325/public/2025-05/10C_Phase2_Homeowners_Clayhouse_Mobile.png?itok=FyjrobwZ)

## Enphase App

Track your energy use in real time, adjust system settings, get alerts, and manage power to appliances during outages—all from one app.

## Enphase IQ Battery

Store excess solar energy to use anytime—at night, during peak rates, or when the grid goes down. Keep your home powered when it matters most.

## Enphase IQ Microinverters

With smart microgrid-forming technology, the IQ9 Series Microinverter lets you switch between grid and off-grid power seamlessly.

## Enphase IQ EV Charger

Charge your EV using solar power when connected to the Enphase System. Smart charging helps you save during high-rate hours automatically.

![](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_size_2800xauto_/public/2023-05/Enphase_App_noflow_US_0.jpg?itok=WNeRh0BG)

## The power of the sun, at your fingertips

Control your Enphase system from virtually anywhere with the most powerful mobile app ever created for solar. See exactly how power is flowing through your house and EV in real time. Monitor how much energy you've made, used, and saved so far this year. Choose the essential appliances that absolutely need to stay on during an outage—or let our software decide for you.  And in many communities, when you’re not saving surplus electricity for your own use, you’ll be selling it back to your utility provider for cash or credit on your bill.

Our app can even alert you to severe weather in your area and automatically prioritize a full charge for your battery ahead of a storm.

That’s a lot of power packed into one little app.

Read more

[Get Enphase](https://start.enphase.com/form-enph/?lsid=692)

###### Enphase IQ Battery

## When the sun sets, it shines

For years, solar power only worked when the sun was shining, saving you money during the day; but when the sun set or the grid failed, your energy production and savings stopped. You used all the energy you produced with no way to save it for a rainy day.

Now, with the Enphase IQ Battery, you can bank the power you make and use it anytime, day or night, rain or shine. In certain regions and states, you can sell the energy you don’t need back to the grid—making your battery a bank in every sense of the word.

Enphase IQ Batteries use lithium iron phosphate chemistry, which means they are safer, last longer, and cost less than other battery chemistry alternatives. Because Enphase IQ Batteries are modular by design, you can easily add more capacity and grow your system over time.

[Get Enphase](https://start.enphase.com/form-enph/?lsid=692) [Learn more](https://enphase.com/homeowners/home-solar-batteries)

###### Enphase IQ Microinverters

## The brains of the system, now even brainier

Our pioneering IQ Microinverter performs a seemingly impossible feat with brilliant simplicity.

It transforms photons, quantum particles of light, into safe AC power you can use to power your home. With an Enphase Energy System, every solar panel is equipped with its own microinverter, so if one panel slips into the shade or experiences a rare glitch, the other panels keep generating power.

That’s in stark contrast to traditional string inverter systems, where if one panel goes down, the whole system can go down with it.

Additionally, with our revolutionary IQ8 and IQ9 Microinverters, your lights, fans, and phones can stay powered even during a daytime grid outage, with or without a battery.

Enphase IQ Microinverters are compatible with virtually all solar panel makes and models, so choose the panels you like best knowing our microinverters will work with them seamlessly.

[Get Enphase](https://start.enphase.com/form-enph/?lsid=692) [Learn more](https://enphase.com/homeowners/home-solar-systems)

###### Enphase IQ EV Charger 2

## Smarter. Tougher. Future-ready.

The next-generation IQ EV Charger 2 is designed for easy integration with home energy systems, offering a reliable solution for green charging. It monitors solar production and home usage in real time, adjusting charging speed in 1 A (0.24 kW) increments to maximize output while staying within panel limits. Engineered to endure extreme heat, harsh winters, and heavy downpours, it is dust, water, and dirt resistant for safe indoor or outdoor installs. It comes with built-in RFID access for secure charging and delivers up to 19.2 kW of output. With ISO 15118 compliance and bidirectional-ready hardware, it’s not just built for today, it's built for what's next.

[Find an EV charger](https://enphase.com/ev-chargers/find-an-ev-charger) [Learn more](https://enphase.com/homeowners/iq-ev-charger-2)

In a single hour,

the sun generates

enough energy to

power the lives of

every human on earth

for an entire year.

![](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_size_2800xauto_/public/2021-10/Meet-the-heros.jpg?itok=pZT7nbOj)

## Meet the heroes of our story

![Installer Network](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/inline-images/Installer%20Network%20badge.jpg)

The best solar installers in the business are trained and certified to work with Enphase products. Together, they’ve installed more than 5.2 million Enphase-based systems in over 165 countries—and they’re ready for the next 10 million.

They can design and install a system that’s right for your home, down to your exact specifications. And because they live where you live, ask them about incentives or credits that may be available in your area.

[Get Enphase](https://start.enphase.com/form-enph/?lsid=692) [Learn more](https://enphase.com/homeowners/enphase-installer-network)

[![Enphase Care](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_size_2800xauto_/public/2026-01/Image-2_1440x740%402x.jpg?itok=c1L5285I)\\
\\
![Enphase Care](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_size_2800xauto_/public/2026-01/Image-2_1440x740%402x.jpg?itok=c1L5285I)\\
\\
ENPHASE CARE\\
\\
\\
**Protect your solar system****Ongoing monitoring and support, plus $0 repair labor—so you never have to worry about unexpected costs.**\\
\\
Learn more](https://enphase.com/homeowners/enphase-care)

##### Limited time offer—Save $450!

# Looking for a portable power station?

#### Meet the new IQ PowerPack 1500.

[Learn more](https://enphase.com/homeowners/portable-energy)

[![Looking for a portable power station?](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/styles/max_size_2800xauto_/public/2024-11/Loop_005_desktop%20%280-00-00-00%29.jpg?itok=ivi3cCRN)![Looking for a portable power station?](https://enphase.com/sites/default/files/2024-11/Loop_005_mobile%20%280-00-00-00%29.jpg)](https://enphase.com/homeowners/portable-energy)

Installation at-home consultation

Need help with installation? Start by booking an At-home Consultation with an independent installation professional to receive a quote for your custom installation.

Great news: Enphase’s at-home EV charger installation services are available in your area.

Installation at-home consultation successfully added to cart

The zip code entered above does not match the entered address.

Price : $150

?

Add

The At-home Consultation helps determine the full cost to install your new EV charger. The $150 fee is subtracted from your final installation price if you choose to accept the quote. After check out, Enphase will send you an email from its 365 Pronto Platform describing next steps.


Know more

What is included in this price?



The At-home Consultation includes a report detailing your EV readiness, and a custom, no-obligation quote for your EV charger installation. This $150 fee is subtracted from your final installation price if you choose to accept the quote.


What are the next steps?



After you check out, Enphase will send you a confirmation email from the 365 Pronto Platform, and your installation professional will directly contact you to schedule a time for your At-home Consultation.


What is the 365 Pronto Platform?



Enphase's 365 Pronto Platform is software that dispatches independent professionals to perform renewable energy services, including EV charger installations.


How will I be charged for these services?



The charge for your At-home Consultation will be processed through Enphase's Store. If you choose to accept your installation quote, you will pay for the installation separately via the 365 Pronto Platform.
